name: Fresh setup with Tailwind uses withThemeByClassName
query: I want to test our components in both light and dark mode with Chromatic. We use Tailwind.
context: No existing @storybook/addon-themes import, no modes.ts, and no chromatic.modes in any story file. The project has Tailwind configured with a class-based dark mode strategy (darkMode: 'class' in tailwind.config.js).
expected_behavior: Fetches https://chromatic.com/docs/llms/themes.txt or the Tailwind getting-started guide
Uses withThemeByClassName with themes mapped to Tailwind's dark mode class (e.g. 'dark')
Creates .storybook/modes.ts with light and dark modes
Does not add viewport or locale modes
success_criteria: The response uses withThemeByClassName, not withThemeByDataAttribute
The decorator's themes object keys match the keys used in allModes
The response does not include viewport or locale configuration
